item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-033","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately brakes on adding a third rule, redirects upstream to diagnose why existing rules failed, and proposes replacing/deleting an existing rule rather than accumulating another one. It explicitly frames the issue as trigger conditions, target state, rule conflict, and minimal rewrite, matching the anti-spiral pass criteria. No fail signal of simply adding a rule is observed."}
